pairs.question: What is the real name of the professional wrestler known as Dolph Ziggler?
pairs.answer: The professional wrestler known as Dolph Ziggler's real name is Nicholas Theodore Nemeth.

pairs.question: How many times did Dolph Ziggler win the Intercontinental Championship during his WWE tenure?
pairs.answer: Dolph Ziggler won the Intercontinental Championship six times during his WWE tenure.

pairs.question: What notable championship did Dolph Ziggler win in his first match in New Japan Pro-Wrestling (NJPW)?
pairs.answer: Dolph Ziggler won the IWGP Global Heavyweight Championship in his debut match in New Japan Pro-Wrestling (NJPW).

pairs.question: Which wrestling promotions has Nic Nemeth performed in after leaving WWE?
pairs.answer: After leaving WWE, Nic Nemeth has performed in the independent circuit, New Japan Pro-Wrestling (NJPW), and Total Nonstop Action Wrestling (TNA).

pairs.question: What was one of the key roles Nemeth played in WWE before adopting the Dolph Ziggler persona?
pairs.answer: Before adopting the Dolph Ziggler persona, Nemeth played the role of the caddie sidekick to Kerwin White on WWE's Raw brand in 2005.

pairs.question: Write a Python snippet to calculate the total number of major championships (excluding WWE) Nemeth won after 2023.
pairs.answer:
python
# Major championships won after 2023 (excluding WWE)
championships = [
    "IWGP Global Heavyweight Championship",
    "AAA Mega Championship",
    "TNA World Championship",
    "TNA World Tag Team Championship"
]

print(f"Total major non-WWE championships won: {len(championships)}")

pairs.question: What is one of the notable accomplishments Nemeth achieved at WrestleMania or a WWE pay-per-view event?
pairs.answer: One of Nemeth's notable accomplishments is headlining multiple WWE pay-per-view events as Dolph Ziggler.
